summary: Solid soundboard recording with occasional speed glitches; the first set shines and the China>Rider is a highlight, but the second set runs a little sloppy.
review: The show delivers a powerful first set packed with tight playing—Bertha, West L.A., Rooster and an especially fierce China>Rider earn high praise. The soundboard source is generally clear, though listeners note minor speed problems in the opening half and some tape‑hiss crackle. The second set offers good moments (Estimated Eyes, Feel Like A Stranger) but feels a bit loose compared to the opener.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the performance and recording around 4 / 5, with strong positives for the first set and China>Rider offset by noted speed issues and a sloppy second half; weighted averaging yields ~3.9.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear SBD capture overall, but minor tape‑speed inconsistencies in the first set and occasional hiss/crackle noted by listeners.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is high‑energy and tightly executed; second set contains good moments but feels less focused, leading to a mixed overall pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for ripping Eyes and delivering fierce guitar work on Bertha and the China>Rider, though some note occasional sloppiness later in the show.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent is mentioned positively as part of the lineup during this era.
